summary: G1-G4 PASS, G5 PASS w/ 4 open PRs (#17, #18, #19, #21). e2e misroute STILL open (root vs docs/tests/{e2e,unit}). 3 new commits add grade.sh + lefthook.yml + pheno-cli doctest (P0 quality lift, no hygiene regression). 3 actionable findings, P0=1, P1=2.

ubuntu-24.04 runner in 14/18 (build-release + scorecard inherit)

CITATION.cff=Apache-2.0, LICENSE-file=MIT, Cargo.toml='MIT OR Apache-2.0' — three signals, all consistent

.coderabbit.yaml present (severity info per AGENTS.md mandate)
.gemini/ STILL MISSING (AGENTS.md mandates it — drift, unchanged from tick-19)
dependabot.yml: gomod + pip + npm + cargo daily

4 OPEN PRs: #17 (sync 73 commits), #18 (Electrobun shell), #19 (SUPPORT.md) MERGEABLE, #21 (Code of Conduct) MERGEABLE — two of the four would close G2 + G5 gaps on merge
quality-gate.yml:33-35 checks `[ -d "e2e" ]` / `[ -d "tests" ]` / `[ -d "integration" ]` at REPO ROOT
Actual tests live at docs/tests/{component,e2e,helpers,playwright.config.ts,unit}/ — NOT at root
Actual e2e: docs/tests/e2e/docsite.spec.ts (Playwright) — never runs in CI
Actual unit: docs/tests/unit/site-meta.test.mjs — never runs in CI
Consequence: has_tests=false, has_e2e=false, has_integration=false on every run → e2e-tests + integration-tests jobs ALWAYS skip; same finding as tick-19 PR #107 (unresolved)
Only CI-run tests are cargo test --lib --all-features (unit-tests job) — Rust core only

additional_findings.grade_framework_merge: 0e1805a adds grade.sh (198 LOC) + lefthook.yml (74 LOC) + Taskfile.yml grade tasks + .grade-reports/ to .gitignore + docs/acceptance-contracts/ template. The grade script auto-detects stack (Rust/Node/Python) and emits JSON/HTML reports. lefthook provides pre-commit/commit-msg/pre-push hook framework. Net: adds fleet-wide quality grading without disturbing existing CI.
additional_findings.pheno_cli_doctest: bc52dc9 extracts pheno-cli db_path from main.rs into lib.rs with a runnable doctest + unit-test mirror. Pure-binary crates don't run doctests under cargo test, so this is the canonical lib-extraction pattern. main.rs now uses pheno_cli::db_path. Net: +1 doctest, +1 unit test, main.rs shrinks by 22 lines.
additional_findings.local_branch_drift: Same 24+ vestigial branches as tick-19 (chore/*, ci/*, codex/*, docs/*, feat/*, fix/*). 5 still ahead of main: chore/3rd/4th/5th-hygiene-2026-06-08 (snapshot mirrors), chore/helioslab-tracing-consolidate-20260608 (unmerged refactor), chore/helioslab-tracing-verbose-and-quality-gate-reusable-20260608 (chain off tracing-consolidate). Per tick-19 these are vestigial.
additional_findings.version_drift_unchanged: VERSION='0.14.11-canary.1' (2026-03-29), Cargo.toml workspace.package.version='0.1.1' (2026-04-25). Two version-of-record signals, unresolved.
additional_findings.open_pr_burst: 4 open PRs vs 2 in tick-19 audit. #17=#98 (sync 73 commits, closed 2026-05-29) is re-listed; #18 (Electrobun shell, sha 0e1805a is also in it) is new; #19 (SUPPORT.md) and #21 (Code of Conduct) close the G2 gaps on merge.
additional_findings.uncommitted_dir: docs/specs/ is untracked (this branch). Likely intentional — same dir is .gitignored elsewhere or about-to-be-added by an in-flight worktree.
additional_findings.duplicate_security_guard: .github/hooks/security-guard.sh and .github/scripts/security-guard.sh still NOT byte-identical (pre-commit framework vs ggshield impls). scripts/ copy is dead code; only hooks/ is invoked by security-guard-hook-audit.yml.

actions_recommended.title: Fix e2e/tests detection path in quality-gate.yml (tick-19 carry-over, now 2 days old)
actions_recommended.detail: quality-gate.yml:33-35 checks for e2e/, tests/, integration/ at repo root. HeliosLab's tests live at docs/tests/{e2e,unit,helpers}/. Update check-changes to glob `**/tests/e2e`, `**/e2e`, or check docs/tests/e2e/docsite.spec.ts existence. Adds real e2e coverage to CI for the first time (docs/tests/e2e/docsite.spec.ts is currently dark). Optionally add a Playwright run step that invokes the docs-site preview server. 5-line fix unlocks the entire docs-site test suite.
actions_recommended.estimated_effort: 5 min for path fix + 30 min for Playwright run step wiring

actions_recommended.title: Land PR #19 (SUPPORT.md) and PR #21 (Code of Conduct) — both OPEN MERGEABLE
actions_recommended.detail: Two of the four open PRs directly close G2 + G5 gaps. #19 (sha 8d44423) adds SUPPORT.md. #21 (sha 91fb4c5 from HeliosLab-4th worktree) adds Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct. Both are mergeable per gh pr list. Approving + admin-merging both brings HeliosLab to 100% G2 + G5 in a single batch.

actions_recommended.title: Add .gemini/ directory to satisfy AGENTS.md mandate (drift since tick-19)
actions_recommended.detail: AGENTS.md mandates .gemini/config.yaml with code_review.comment_severity_threshold: LOW. .gemini/ still MISSING. This is the single remaining G5 file-presence gap once #19 + #21 land. Create .gemini/config.yaml with the 3-line org-standard stub (matches what HeliosLab-3rd/4th/5th have).

deep_research: HeliosLab sits in the Phenotype 'config/flags/secrets' family alongside HexaKit, PhenoKits, PhenoSchema, and pheno-crypto. The current branch (chore/helioslab-pheno-cli-doctest-or-bench-20260608, 0e1805a) is 3 commits ahead of origin/main and adds two non-hygiene features on top of the tick-19 baseline: (1) grade.sh + lefthook.yml + Taskfile grade tasks (a 354-LOC fleet-wide grading framework, the same one 7+ other repos merged today), and (2) a pheno-cli doctest + lib-extraction (41 LOC) that gives pure-binary crates the ability to run doctests under cargo test — a small but canonical Rust-quality lift. The G1-G5 gates are unchanged from tick-19 except for one positive: deploy-docs.yml no longer has two top-level `on:` keys (the prior deploy-docs.yml:2 + :8 shadowing bug is RESOLVED in this branch — yq now reports a single resolved `on: { push: { branches: [ main ] } }`). All third-party actions remain SHA-pinned to the org standard; reusable workflow calls keep the '# pinned from @ref; org SHA may shift' annotation. The trufflehog/actions rot that bit 17+ other repos in tick-17 is NOT present. CODEOWNERS, dependabot.yml, required-checks guard, ISSUE_TEMPLATE/*, and pull_request_template.md are all org-canonical.
deep_research_cont: The single biggest residual risk is unchanged from tick-19: the e2e test detection bug. quality-gate.yml:33 still looks for e2e/, tests/, integration/ at the repo root, but HeliosLab's only e2e (docsite.spec.ts Playwright) and only docs unit (site-meta.test.mjs) live under docs/tests/{e2e,unit,helpers}/. Result: every PR shows 'E2E Tests: SKIPPED' and 'Integration Tests: SKIPPED' in the Quality Report, and the docs-site test suite has never run in CI. PR #19 (SUPPORT.md) and PR #21 (Code of Conduct) are both OPEN MERGEABLE and would close the two G2/G5 file-presence gaps in a single admin-merge batch. Three smaller carry-overs from tick-19: (a) .gemini/ still missing (AGENTS.md mandate); (b) VERSION='0.14.11-canary.1' vs Cargo.toml='0.1.1' version drift unresolved; (c) the duplicate security-guard.sh pair (hooks/ vs scripts/, different scanner impls) where scripts/ is dead code. The 24+ vestigial local branches persist, including the three HeliosLab-{3rd,4th,5th} snapshot mirrors which exist only for the wipe-recovery worktrees and could be removed once those PRs (#17, #19, #21) merge. HeliosLab overall: hygiene score 4.6/5 (G1-G4 solid; G5 90% — only .gemini/ missing; e2e detection still broken; 4 open PRs vs 2 last audit).
